prompt: The Whale — vibrant editorial portrait illustration. A massive imposing figure in a sharp dark pinstripe suit, silhouetted against a wall of Bloomberg terminals glowing blue and green. Face always in shadow, only large powerful hands visible resting on a keyboard. Enormous presence fills the room. The screens show massive buy orders being filled. Mood: silent power, ancient capital, unknowable. Deep navy blue and cold neon color palette, cinematic lighting, painterly style, no text.
